items.headline: UN warns Sudan's war is entering a deadlier phase as drone strikes increase
items.body: The United Nations warns Sudan’s war is entering a significantly deadlier phase. Armed drones are now the leading cause of civilian deaths in multiple regions.

items.headline: Kuwait summons Iranian ambassador after alleged border incursion by Revolutionary Guards
items.body: Kuwait summoned Iran's ambassador over an alleged border infiltration by Revolutionary Guards. The incident created a direct diplomatic and security crisis between the two nations.

items.headline: Japanese snack giant changes packaging to black and white due to war
items.body: A major Japanese snack maker changed its packaging to black and white. The Iran conflict disrupted the global supply of raw materials for colored ink.

items.headline: Displacement by Colombian conflict doubled in one year, Red Cross reports
items.body: Internal displacement from conflict in Colombia doubled last year, says the Red Cross. Aid agencies now face a greatly expanded humanitarian crisis requiring immediate adjustments.

sources: Supreme Court of the United States

items.headline: US Supreme Court allows Alabama to eliminate majority-Black congressional district
items.body: Alabama can now redraw maps to remove one of two majority-Black districts before November midterms. Republicans gain an additional House seat as the state joins several others redrawing boundaries after the Court gutted Voting Rights Act protections.

items.headline: Philippine House votes to impeach Vice President Sara Duterte
items.body: Lawmakers overwhelmingly approved impeachment charges including misuse of funds and threatening the president. She now faces a Senate trial that could remove her from office and ban her from the 2028 presidential race she was leading.

items.headline: EU bans Brazilian meat imports from September
items.body: The European Union imposed a full import ban on Brazilian meat starting in September. The decision reshapes agricultural trade flows and forces Brazil to redirect millions of tons of beef and poultry exports.

items.headline: Spain confirms first hantavirus case from Antarctic cruise outbreak
items.body: A Spanish passenger from the MV Hondius has been in hospital isolation in Madrid since May 11. EU guidance now directs member states on testing and quarantine protocols for returning cruise passengers across the continent.
